violations.text: Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The condensate from the walk in refrigeration unit was observed freezing to the side of the blower fan. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment must defrost unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025

The floors behind equipment have an accumulation of soil residue, rodent droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all rodent droppings. Establishment is to use appropriate means of cleaning and sanitizing. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025
(Various foods) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk-in cooler). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The cutting boards in the (prep unit area) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
Walk-in refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
The condensate from the (Walk-in) refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The bathroom in the back area is lacking a door. All bathrooms must have a door. Establishment is to send photographic evidence to RIDOH that the door has been installed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
The (ceiling tiles) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
